info.title: CSharpier
info.description: CSharpier is an opinionated code formatter for c#.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

arguments.name: directoryOrFile
arguments.description: One or more paths to - a directory containing files to format or a specific file to format. May be omitted when piping data via stdin.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check that files are formatted. Will not write any changes.

arguments.name: directoryOrFile
arguments.description: One or more paths to - a directory containing files to format or a specific file to format. May be omitted when piping data via stdin.

commands.name: pipe-files
commands.description: Keep csharpier running so that multiples files can be piped to it via stdin.

commands.name: server
commands.description: Run CSharpier as a server so that multiple files may be formatted.
